# Fix permissions and line endings for all scripts
for script in *.sh; do
    chmod +x "$script"
    sed -i 's/\r$//' "$script"
done

# Fix permissions and line endings for all scripts
for script in *.sh; do
    chmod +x "$script"
    sed -i 's/\r$//' "$script"
done

# Fix BLE daemon scripts
cd ../gateway/ble-daemon
for script in *.sh; do
    chmod +x "$script"
    sed -i 's/\r$//' "$script"
done

cd ../../deploy
